title: LINCKODE's 1.20 Base
description:
Minecraft 1.20.2 modpack to serve as a base for other projects.
Includes optimization and QOL mods.
body:
# LINCKODE's 1.20 Base

![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-%2316181c.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=%2300AF5C)  

Minecraft 1.20.2 modpack to serve as a base for other projects.  
Includes optimization and QOL mods.  

**Comes with [NVIDIUM](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) and [Bobby]([https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby))**.  

![nVIDIA](https://img.shields.io/badge/nVIDIA-%2376B900.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=nVIDIA&logoColor=white)

You can still use this pack if you don't have an NVIDIA GPU. Just unlock the instance and disable **NVIDIUM**.

***
**This pack comes with a fullbright mod and Xaero's Minimap / World Map** which, depending on what servers you play, may be considered ***cheats***.
> A full list of the included mods can be viewed by looking at the page of the latest version!
